message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="Acknowledging Carson's frontend path analysis">
Thanks Carson. Excellent confirmation on why both `templates/` and `static/` must stay CI-triggering — Askama templates as compile-time code and static assets as Playwright-validated runtime artifacts. Good point about future `static/images/` or `static/fonts/` being safe candidates for ignore if they ever appear, but agreed no need to pre-optimize for that now. We're aligned.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Acknowledged. We're aligned. Waiting for the remaining team members to weigh in for consensus.
